members.name: AddIconItem
members.signature: public void AddIconItem(Texture2D texture, String label, int id)
members.summary: Adds an item, with a [param texture] icon, text [param label] and (optionally) [param id]. If no [param id] is passed, the item index will be used as the item's ID. New items are appended at the end. [b]Note:[/b] The item will be selected if there are no other items.

members.name: AddItem
members.signature: public void AddItem(String label, int id)
members.summary: Adds an item, with text [param label] and (optionally) [param id]. If no [param id] is passed, the item index will be used as the item's ID. New items are appended at the end. [b]Note:[/b] The item will be selected if there are no other items.

members.name: AddSeparator
members.summary: Adds a separator to the list of items. Separators help to group items, and can optionally be given a [param text] header. A separator also gets an index assigned, and is appended at the end of the item list.

members.name: Clear
members.summary: Clears all the items in the [OptionButton].

members.name: GetItemAutoTranslateMode
members.summary: Returns the auto translate mode of the item at index [param idx].

members.name: GetItemIcon
members.summary: Returns the icon of the item at index [param idx].

members.name: GetItemId
members.summary: Returns the ID of the item at index [param idx].

members.name: GetItemIndex
members.summary: Returns the index of the item with the given [param id].

members.name: GetItemMetadata
members.summary: Retrieves the metadata of an item. Metadata may be any type and can be used to store extra information about an item, such as an external string ID.

members.name: GetItemText
members.summary: Returns the text of the item at index [param idx].

members.name: GetItemTooltip
members.summary: Returns the tooltip of the item at index [param idx].

members.name: GetPopup
members.summary: Returns the [PopupMenu] contained in this button. [b]Warning:[/b] This is a required internal node, removing and freeing it may cause a crash. If you wish to hide it or any of its children, use their [member Window.visible] property.

members.name: GetSelectableItem
members.summary: Returns the index of the first item which is not disabled, or marked as a separator. If [param from_last] is [code]true[/code], the items will be searched in reverse order. Returns [code]-1[/code] if no item is found.

members.name: GetSelectedId
members.summary: Returns the ID of the selected item, or [code]-1[/code] if no item is selected.

members.name: GetSelectedMetadata
members.summary: Gets the metadata of the selected item. Metadata for items can be set using [method set_item_metadata].

members.name: HasSelectableItems
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if this button contains at least one item which is not disabled, or marked as a separator.

members.name: IsItemDisabled
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the item at index [param idx] is disabled.

members.name: IsItemSeparator
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the item at index [param idx] is marked as a separator.

members.name: RemoveItem
members.summary: Removes the item at index [param idx].

members.name: Select
members.summary: Selects an item by index and makes it the current item. This will work even if the item is disabled. Passing [code]-1[/code] as the index deselects any currently selected item.

members.name: SetDisableShortcuts
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], shortcuts are disabled and cannot be used to trigger the button.

members.name: SetItemAutoTranslateMode
members.signature: public void SetItemAutoTranslateMode(int idx, int mode)
members.summary: Sets the auto translate mode of the item at index [param idx]. Items use [constant Node.AUTO_TRANSLATE_MODE_INHERIT] by default, which uses the same auto translate mode as the [OptionButton] itself.

members.name: SetItemDisabled
members.signature: public void SetItemDisabled(int idx, bool disabled)
members.summary: Sets whether the item at index [param idx] is disabled. Disabled items are drawn differently in the dropdown and are not selectable by the user. If the current selected item is set as disabled, it will remain selected.

members.name: SetItemIcon
members.signature: public void SetItemIcon(int idx, Texture2D texture)
members.summary: Sets the icon of the item at index [param idx].

members.name: SetItemId
members.signature: public void SetItemId(int idx, int id)
members.summary: Sets the ID of the item at index [param idx].

members.name: SetItemMetadata
members.signature: public void SetItemMetadata(int idx, Variant metadata)
members.summary: Sets the metadata of an item. Metadata may be of any type and can be used to store extra information about an item, such as an external string ID.

members.name: SetItemText
members.signature: public void SetItemText(int idx, String text)
members.summary: Sets the text of the item at index [param idx].

members.name: SetItemTooltip
members.signature: public void SetItemTooltip(int idx, String tooltip)
members.summary: Sets the tooltip of the item at index [param idx].

members.name: ShowPopup
members.summary: Adjusts popup position and sizing for the [OptionButton], then shows the [PopupMenu]. Prefer this over using [code]get_popup().popup()[/code].

members.name: AllowReselect
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the currently selected item can be selected again.

members.name: FitToLongestItem
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], minimum size will be determined by the longest item's text, instead of the currently selected one's. [b]Note:[/b] For performance reasons, the minimum size doesn't update immediately when adding, removing or modifying items.

members.name: ItemCount
members.summary: The number of items to select from.

members.name: SearchBarEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], shows a search bar at the top of the [PopupMenu] for filtering items. See [member search_bar_min_item_count] for dynamically controlling its visibility based on the number of items.

members.name: SearchBarFuzzySearchEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], enables fuzzy searching in the [PopupMenu] search bar. This allows the search results to include items that almost match the search query, as well items that match the individual characters of the search query, but not in sequence. Use [member search_bar_fuzzy_search_max_misses] to set the maximum number of mismatches allowed in the search results.

members.name: SearchBarFuzzySearchMaxMisses
members.summary: Sets the maximum number of mismatches allowed in each search result when fuzzy searching is enabled for the [PopupMenu] search bar. Any item with more mismatches will be hidden from the search results.

members.name: SearchBarMinItemCount
members.summary: Sets the minimum number of items required for the [PopupMenu] search bar to be visible. [member search_bar_enabled] must be [code]true[/code] for this to have any effect.

members.name: Selected
members.summary: The index of the currently selected item, or [code]-1[/code] if no item is selected.

rawMembers.name: popup/item_{index}/disabled
rawMembers.summary: If [code]true[/code], the item at [code]index[/code] is disabled. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. item_count - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: popup/item_{index}/icon
rawMembers.summary: The icon of the item at [code]index[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. item_count - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: popup/item_{index}/id
rawMembers.summary: The ID of the item at [code]index[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. item_count - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: popup/item_{index}/separator
rawMembers.summary: If [code]true[/code], the item at [code]index[/code] is a separator. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. item_count - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: popup/item_{index}/text
rawMembers.summary: The text of the item at [code]index[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. item_count - 1[/code] range.

signals.name: ItemFocused
signals.summary: Emitted when the user navigates to an item using the [member ProjectSettings.input/ui_up] or [member ProjectSettings.input/ui_down] input actions. The index of the item focused is passed as argument.

signals.name: ItemSelected
signals.summary: Emitted when the current item has been changed by the user. The index of the item selected is passed as argument. [member allow_reselect] must be enabled to reselect an item.
